frame_analyses.description: Initial setup showing gauze suspended between clamps with 4cm diameter circle marked
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Gauze properly positioned, circle clearly marked, instruments ready

frame_analyses.description: Left scissors beginning to grasp gauze edge to initiate cutting
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Proper instrument positioning, approaching from appropriate angle

frame_analyses.description: Scissors engaged with gauze, making first incision near the marked circle
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good control, cutting appears to be at appropriate distance from line

frame_analyses.description: Progressing clockwise around circle, approximately 1/8 of circle completed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth cutting motion, maintaining consistent distance from marked line

frame_analyses.description: Continuing clockwise progression, approximately 1/4 of circle completed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good technique maintained, cut appears within acceptable tolerance
Consistent cutting technique, no visible deviation from line

frame_analyses.description: Approximately halfway around circle, continuing clockwise motion
Progressing past halfway point, approximately 5/8 of circle completed
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth progression, cut quality remains consistent

frame_analyses.description: Approximately 3/4 of circle completed, nearing completion
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good control maintained throughout cutting sequence

frame_analyses.description: Final portion of circle being cut, nearly complete
Circle appears fully cut out, task completion
Final assessment phase, circular pattern completely removed

penalties.description: Minor deviation estimated at 12 o'clock position approximately 1mm outside line
Minor deviation estimated at 6 o'clock position approximately 1mm outside line

confidence_rationale: Clear view of cutting progression and completion. Deviation measurements estimated from camera angle - exact millimeter measurements difficult to assess with complete precision from this viewing angle.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviations at all 8 cardinal points due to camera angle and resolution limitations
Whether any microscopic gauze fibers remained attached at completion
technique_summary: Expert-level performance with excellent time management (88s vs 60-90s expert benchmark). Clean, controlled cutting with minimal deviation from marked line. Smooth progression around entire circle.
strengths: Excellent completion time within expert range
Clean circle removal with minimal deviation
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining exact distance from line at 12 and 6 o'clock positions
Consider slightly slower pace to achieve perfect precision if aiming for zero deviation
